data.body:
## Description
Create plugins/dso/agents/feasibility-reviewer.md — a dedicated plugin agent that verifies external tool feasibility during brainstorm.

**Agent behavior:**
- Uses WebSearch to verify external tool capabilities against claims in the epic spec
- Searches GitHub for known-working integration code using the specific tools/APIs
- Produces a Technical Feasibility section with verified constraints and identified risks
- When a critical capability gap is found (no verified code, no public documentation, no sandbox), flags the epic as high-risk and recommends a spike task
- Scores pass/fail on two dimensions: technical_feasibility and integration_risk

**Integration signal categories** (what triggers this reviewer):
Third-party CLI tools, external APIs/services, CI/CD workflow changes, infrastructure provisioning, data format migrations, authentication/credential flows

**Output**: JSON conforming to REVIEW-SCHEMA.md with perspective 'Technical Feasibility' and dimensions: technical_feasibility, integration_risk

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/feasibility-reviewer.md — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/feasibility-reviewer.md
- [ ] Agent contains WebSearch instructions
  Verify: grep -qi 'websearch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/feasibility-reviewer.md
- [ ] Agent contains integration signal categories
  Verify: grep -q 'third-party\|external API\|CI/CD' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/feasibility-reviewer.md
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_feasibility_reviewer_agent.py --tb=short -q

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
